mapper.sql: id, area_name, currency_name, currency_code, currency_symbol, area_code, area_name_local, phone_code, area_name_zh, area_name_zh_trad, area_name_en, area_name_fil, area_name_ar, area_name_hi, area_name_bn, area_name_fr, area_name_vi, area_name_pt, area_name_es, area_name_jap, area_name_ko, area_name_id
mapper.insert: insert into country (area_name, currency_name, currency_code, currency_symbol, area_code, area_name_local, phone_code, area_name_zh, area_name_zh_trad, area_name_en, area_name_fil, area_name_ar, area_name_hi, area_name_bn, area_name_fr, area_name_vi, area_name_pt, area_name_es, area_name_jap, area_name_ko, area_name_id ) values (#{areaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currencySymbol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameLocal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phoneCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameZhTrad,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameFil,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameAr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameHi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameBn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameFr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameVi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNamePt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameEs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameJap,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameKo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areaNameId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into country
area_name,
currency_name,
currency_code,
currency_symbol,
area_code,
area_name_local,
phone_code,
area_name_zh,
area_name_zh_trad,
area_name_en,
area_name_fil,
area_name_ar,
area_name_hi,
area_name_bn,
area_name_fr,
area_name_vi,
area_name_pt,
area_name_es,
area_name_jap,
area_name_ko,
area_name_id,

mapper.update:
update country
area_name = #{areaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
currency_name = #{currencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
currency_code = #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
currency_symbol = #{currencySymbol,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_code = #{areaCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_local = #{areaNameLocal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone_code = #{phoneCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_zh = #{areaNameZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_zh_trad = #{areaNameZhTrad,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_en = #{areaNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_fil = #{areaNameFil,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_ar = #{areaNameAr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_hi = #{areaNameHi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_bn = #{areaNameBn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_fr = #{areaNameFr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_vi = #{areaNameVi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_pt = #{areaNamePt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_es = #{areaNameEs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_jap = #{areaNameJap,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_ko = #{areaNameKo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
area_name_id = #{areaNameId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update country set area_name = #{areaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, currency_name = #{currencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, currency_code = #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, currency_symbol = #{currencySymbol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_code = #{areaCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_local = #{areaNameLocal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone_code = #{phoneCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_zh = #{areaNameZh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_zh_trad = #{areaNameZhTrad,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_en = #{areaNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_fil = #{areaNameFil,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_ar = #{areaNameAr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_hi = #{areaNameHi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_bn = #{areaNameBn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_fr = #{areaNameFr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_vi = #{areaNameVi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_pt = #{areaNamePt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_es = #{areaNameEs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_jap = #{areaNameJap,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_ko = #{areaNameKo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, area_name_id = #{areaNameId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
